query:
SELECT 
  c.id as company_id,
  c.name as company_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as total_sales,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) as total_goals
FROM companies c
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.id = u.companyId
LEFT JOIN sales s ON c.id = s.companyId
LEFT JOIN goals g ON c.id = g.companyId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%baggio%' OR c.name LIKE '%teste%' OR c.name LIKE '%test%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.name;
